headlines.title: Visa, Mastercard defend card fee settlement
headlines.summary: Large merchants argued in a Monday court hearing that card surcharges and discounts would pose significant burdens on their businesses.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, settlement ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Flex and Teradyne expand partnership to scale physical AI
headlines.summary: Flex and Teradyne Robotics expanded their partnership to accelerate physical AI across global manufacturing facilities.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Quantum computing is coming to a data center near you
headlines.summary: Quantum computers can solve problems that that classical machines can't. Companies like Nvidia and Microsoft have already built its infrastructure
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, Nvidia ve yapay zeka cipleri tarafinda altyapi yarisinin hiz kesmeden devam ettigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: YZ altyapi yarisi sermaye akislarini, cip talebini ve platform kazananlarini belirler. Bu sinyal özellikle data center, microsoft ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Learn about the latest advances in physical AI at the Robotics Summit
headlines.summary: The Robotics Summit & Expo will have an entire track of sessions focusing on how to apply artificial intelligence to robotics.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
